mapper.insert: insert into user_info (guid, user_id, user_name, nick_name, photo, phone_encrypt, email_encrypt, phone_hash, email_hash, password, signature, status, role_code, create_by, create_date, update_by, update_time) values (#{guid}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{nickName}, #{photo}, #{phoneEncrypt}, #{emailEncrypt}, #{phoneHash}, #{emailHash}, #{password}, #{signature}, #{status}, #{roleCode}, #{createBy}, #{createDate}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime})
